task_completion.description: Create at least 3 measurement markups on the MRI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface showing at least 3 measurement lines on the MRI slices, or the Markups module open displaying a list of at least 3 measurement items.

task_completion.description: Characterize the tumor border in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the 'infiltration_report.json' file with the 'border_characterization' field populated with descriptive text.

task_completion.description: Identify infiltrated structures in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'infiltration_report.json' file content showing the 'infiltrated_structures' field populated with a list or description of brain structures.
The 'infiltration_report.json' file content showing the 'max_infiltration_radius_mm' field populated with a numerical value.

task_completion.description: Calculate and report the infiltration index (FLAIR/T1ce volume ratio).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'infiltration_report.json' file content showing the 'infiltration_index' field populated with a numerical value.

task_completion.description: Assign an infiltration grade in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'infiltration_report.json' file content showing the 'infiltration_grade' field populated with a grade value.

task_completion.description: Save the markups and report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal showing both 'infiltration_markups.mrk.json' and 'infiltration_report.json' successfully saved in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to view the MRIs and create markups.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 3D Slicer application open with brain MRI volumes (T1ce and FLAIR) loaded and visible in the slice viewers.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed measurements and volume calculations rather than hallucinating numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the Segment Statistics module, Data module, or Markups module in 3D Slicer to obtain the volumes and distances.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-made JSON template without interacting with the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the JSON report correspond to actual interactions and measurements seen in previous 3D Slicer screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: BraTS 2021 dataset modalities include FLAIR, T1, T1ce, and T2. Tumor segmentation labels are: Label 1 for necrotic and non-enhancing tumor core (NCR/NET), Label 2 for peritumoral edema (ED), and Label 4 for GD-enhancing tumor (ET). The infiltration index is defined as the FLAIR/T1ce volume ratio.
